title: University of the Pacific plans new medical school to address doctor shortage
description: The University of the Pacific has announced plans to open a new medical school on its Stockton campus to address the Central Valley's growing physician shortage.

title: Port Jefferson – Stunning, Sun-filled 3 Bedroom End-unit Condo!
description: Updated kitchen, flowing hardwood floors, ample storage, private deck and balcony. The primary suite has en-suite bath. The full finished basement offers generous sized room, lots of storage, a laundry room and egress window. (Optional front load washer/dryer location on the 2nd floor.) Within 3 blocks of the downtown area. All village amenities. $699,000 For more information, click here.
